problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
hypothesis: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monoclonal. Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
